cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Richard could have gone to the bakery. The question says the bakery was closed after 7pm, so we need to find the time before 7pm when he wasn't doing any of the other activities mentioned. First, let's list out all the times Richard was seen doing things: - Woke up at 8am. So he's awake from 8am onwards. That means from 8am, he's up and moving around. But the options include 8am to 9am as an option (D). - Betty saw him at the library from 9am to 2pm. So that's 9am to 2pm. So he can't go to the bakery during that time because he was reading at the library. - David saw him at the electronic store from 2pm to 4pm, fixing the computer. So from 2pm to 4pm he's busy there. So no bakery then. - Mary saw him near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm
